title: BuildSpec
description: Specification of the desired build behavior.

serviceAccount.description: The name of the ServiceAccount to use to run the build pod.

completionDeadlineSeconds.description: Optional duration in seconds the build may run before the system terminates it. The countdown starts from the time the build pod is scheduled.

nodeSelector.description: Selector which must match a node's labels for the build pod to be scheduled on that node.

triggeredBy.description: Describes which triggers started the most recent build.
